name: github_list_selected_repos_for_org_actions_variable
description: List repositories that can access a selected-visibility organization variable (GET /orgs/{org}/actions/variables/{name}/repositories). Returns total_count and repositories. HTTP 409 if visibility is not selected. per_page 1-100 default 30, page, all_pages, max_pages. Classic tokens need admin:org scope (plus repo for private repositories). See GitHub REST Actions variables.
